hero.title: See Your Brand Through AI
hero.subtitle: Understand how AI models perceive your brand, identify what's missing, and continuously improve your AI visibility.
hero.placeholder: Enter your brand or website URL

problem.label: THE PROBLEM
problem.title: AI Doesn't Know Your Brand
problem.description: When users ask ChatGPT, Claude, or Google AI about your industry, does your brand appear? Is it described accurately? Most brands are invisible to AI — not because they're not good, but because they don't speak AI's language.

stats.label: of brands are not mentioned by AI when asked about their category
brand descriptions by AI contain inaccuracies or gaps
AI search usage surpassed 40B queries per month

solution.title: Turn Your Brand Into an AI-Native Asset
solution.description: ZKoner is the first AI Brand Intelligence Platform — a cognitive identity system that measures, optimizes, and monitors how AI understands your brand across every model.

loop.label: THE PRODUCT LOOP
loop.title: Observe → Understand → Improve → Monitor
loop.subtitle: Not a one-time report. A continuous cycle that keeps your brand AI-optimized forever.

steps.title: Scan
steps.desc: Detect how AI models perceive your brand right now

steps.title: Insight
steps.desc: Understand gaps between reality and AI perception

steps.title: Action
steps.desc: Get concrete, prioritized steps to fix the gaps

steps.title: Verify
steps.desc: Confirm corrections took effect across AI models

steps.title: Monitor
steps.desc: Track changes daily, catch regressions early

steps.title: Loop
steps.desc: Repeat — AI perception is a living thing, not a snapshot

productLines.label: PRODUCT LINES
productLines.title: Everything You Need to Own Your AI Presence

items.name: ZKoner Scan
items.desc: Multi-model detection across ChatGPT, Claude, Google AI. See exactly how each model describes your brand.

items.name: ZKoner Insight
items.desc: AI cognition analysis, entity mapping, competitive context. Understand the 'why' behind your AI visibility.

items.name: ZKoner Action
items.desc: Prioritized improvement plan with effort & impact scoring. Schema, content, authority — exactly what to fix.

items.name: ZKoner Monitor
items.desc: Daily tracking, trend detection, email alerts. Your brand's AI pulse, 24/7.

dashboard.label: DASHBOARD
dashboard.title: 5 Metrics. Zero Noise.
dashboard.subtitle: GEO tools drown you in 50+ SEO metrics. We give you exactly 5 — the only ones that matter for AI visibility.

metrics.name: AI Visibility Score
metrics.desc: 0–100 composite score of your brand's AI presence

metrics.name: AI Perception Profile
metrics.desc: How AI 'thinks' about your brand — attributes, known-for, confusion areas

metrics.name: Missing Signals
metrics.desc: Critical gaps ranked by severity with concrete evidence

metrics.name: Recommended Actions
metrics.desc: Prioritized plan with effort & impact scoring, 7-day and 30-day tracks

metrics.name: Monitoring Timeline
metrics.desc: Score history, trend direction, regression alerts

footer.mission: Helping every brand build, monitor, and optimize how AI understands them.
